form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 len at Thirsk April 12 over 1000m defeating Filly Foden carrying 58kg at $1.60. Winning chance again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(13.5). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 len at Thirsk April 12 over 1000m defeating Filly Foden carrying 58kg at $1.60. Winning chance again.

form.formComment: Lining up for just third start. At very big odds at debut, of 7 at this track on March 13 over 1000m, 9 len behind La Belle Forest with 56kg at $51. Second-up ran last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 31 over 1000m, 10 len behind Star Marian carrying 58kg at $67. Will need to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when settled back and ran on when 6th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on September 19 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Storm Esme with 58kg at $9.50. Strong top-three chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(12). Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when settled back and ran on when 6th of 12 at Newcastle All Weather on September 19 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Storm Esme with 58kg at $9.50. Strong top-three chance.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Kempton Park All Weather September 24 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Fiery Damsel carrying 58kg at $12. On debut eighth of 11 at Newbury August 28 over 1200m, 8 len behind Imperial Ballet carrying 58kg at $12. Has ability and is sure to have come on over the break.

form.formComment: Jumped at a huge quote at debut, ran last of 11 at Chelmsford on March 26 over 1200m, 16 len behind Moscow Power with 54.5kg at $201. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when got back early 5th of 7 at Wolverhampton on August 10 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Enricher carrying 58kg at $4.50. Top chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when 4th of 8 at Lingfield All Weather on January 29 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Bucklow Hill carrying 58kg at $41. Improvement likely.
